title: ipomoea obscura
intro: Ipomoea obscura, also known as the purpleback morning glory, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ipomoea obscura include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and alleviate symptoms of the common cold. Ipomoea obscura can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tea, tincture, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
